falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 swing low equivalent would invalidate the 79% bottom pattern match, as that prior bottom held at higher levels and this would represent a lower-low failure pattern rather than a successful retest

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate panic regime change inconsistent with a bottom formation and more consistent with crash continuation, breaking the pattern's volatility signature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >15bps from current level (more negative)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom coincided with curve steepening (un-inversion); deeper inversion would signal worsening growth expectations that contradict the cyclical bottom thesis embedded in the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
